summary: Replace c.http.Jar swap in graphQLGet with a per-request Cookie header. Eliminates the data race on the shared client field flagged by Greptile on PR #740.
reason: graphQLGet previously did `old := c.http.Jar; c.http.Jar = jar; defer ... = old`. With defaultClient as a package-global, any concurrent graphQLGet caller would race on the .Jar field. Race detector currently passes only because no test exercises concurrent paths. Building the Cookie header per-request and passing it via the existing headers map produces the identical wire result (Cookie: header on the outbound request) without shared mutable state. buildCookieHeader is a pure helper covered by three unit tests.
validated_outcome: 162 tests / 21 packages green with -race (added TestBuildCookieHeader_Multiple, _Empty, _SkipsNilAndEmptyName). Live `airbnb-listing get` still returns total=$514 / per_night=$171.18.
